title: polyscias scutellaria
intro: Polyscias scutellaria, also known as the Australian umbrella tree or umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias scutellaria include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Polyscias scutellaria can be made from the leaves and roots, often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
